title: 5/4〜5/8 Weekly Market Report

bot5_themes.theme: 資源（水素・ヘリウム・水）

report:
## Market Overview (Week of May 6–9)

First full trading week post-Golden Week. Modest profit-taking emerged. 38 of 67 themes (57%) advanced, average return +0.82%.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: Defense & Aerospace (+6.8%)
Supplementary defense budget announcement renewed momentum. MHI (7011) and Kawasaki Heavy (7012) rose on contract pipeline visibility.

### 🥈 #2: Shipbuilding (+5.1%)
Korean capacity constraints increasing order flow to Japanese yards.

### 🥉 #3: Optical Communication (+4.7%)
Fujikura (5803) results beat expectations. Datacenter fiber demand remains structurally elevated.

---

## Falling Themes

SaaS (-2.1%), Generative AI (-1.8%) corrected after GW surges. Momentum remains 'Continuing' — not a reversal.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Healthy rotation: overbought AI themes corrected while structural themes (Defense, Shipbuilding, Optical) showed resilience. We maintain overweight in Defense and Optical Communication.

> **Disclaimer**: For informational purposes only. All investment decisions are your sole responsibility.
